issues: Code imports fetch_twitter_activity from crazy.adapters.twitter_activity as required.
Code uses 'tweets' and 'date' columns from adapter output, but also expects 'ticker' and 'sentiment_score' columns which are NOT in the adapter contract returns.
Signal logic requires 'ticker' and 'sentiment_score' columns which are not provided by the adapter; this violates adapter contract usage.
Signal logic correctly implements trigger: sentiment increase > 30% over 7-day avg and at least 100 posts (tweets) for entry (RISK_ON).
Exit logic correctly implements exit when sentiment reverts below 7-day avg or after 5 trading days since entry (RISK_OFF).
Signal aggregation logic returns RISK_ON if any RISK_ON, else RISK_OFF if any RISK_OFF, else HOLD, consistent with spec intent.
Position sizing allocates 2% per position and limits to max 10 positions, consistent with spec.
Overall, failure due to use of columns ('ticker', 'sentiment_score') not provided by the adapter 'twitter_activity' per spec.
